titleStmt.title: SII 5.512: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 512. (A.R. No. 213 of 1894). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE DAKSHINA-KAILASA SHRINE IN THE PANCHANADISVARA TEMPLE AT TIRUVAIYARU.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kavarttai ceṉṟeytalum votteḻu n=te ṇṇil lāṉaiyu (m)ṅ kutiraiyum virutamu miṭain=ta ceṉaiyu(ma)n=tā ṉum ceṟuttu van=ti ṟutta Āhavamallal Āmātuṭaṅ kuḻayavaṉ vekavelkaḷiṟṟu vicai
taravāṅku cilaitura ceñcaramārik kuñcirak kuvaṭṭiniṉ taṉ tiruppuyatti ṉuṉ taṭivarai mārviṉum Oṉṟiya nāṭoṉṟu pukkuravvum vakai kaṇaiyanekamu n=to ṭu cuṭar veṇ rutiyu
ṉṉavaṉ māmaṉ maṇṭalika cokayaṉ mutaliyar taṇṭapālarait taṟaippaṭa nūṟi Āhavamallaṉai pāccic catturupayaṅkaraṉ kāpattirumutal pattiraja kaṭṭa
m ṉekiḻaṅ kun tu vecariyum Oṭṭakaṅkaḷum Avaṉ teviyar kuḻāmuñ ceḻunetip piṟakkamum yar kuḻāmum paṟan=ta lai kavarttu māpperumpukaḻ mika vaḷartta kopparake
caripanma rāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājentra tevarkku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu rājentra ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu poykaināṭṭu tiruvaiyāṟṟut teṉkayilāyamuṭaiyār koyilil Āṭavallārkku nampirāṭṭiyār trai lokkiyamuṭaiyār Atikāric
ci muttāṉ ponnaṅkai cātti Aruḷat tirukkaḻuttukku Iṭṭa caṇpaṅkāṟai Oṉṟuṅ kuṭiñaikkallāl pon Aṟukaḻañcum Itil kaṭṭina māṇikkam Oṉṟum vayira miraṇṭum Uṭpaṭa niṟai Aṟukaḻañcey mañcāṭiyu(m) mañcu
māvum tirukkaikku cāttiaruḷa Iṭṭa tirukkaikkāṟai pon Iru kaḻañcāka tirukkāṟai nālināl poṉ Eṇkaḻañcum tiruvaṭikkāṟai Oṉṟu pon mukkaḻañcāka Iraṇṭināl pon Aṟukaḻañcum Āka pon Irupatiṉkaḻañcum I
tu māṇikkam Oṉṟum vayiram Iraṇṭum Uṭpaṭa niṟai Irupatiṉkaḻañcey mañcāṭiyu(m) mañcumāvum Ivar nampirāṭṭiyārkku cāttiaruḷa Iṭṭa Oṟṟaittālimaṇi patiṉṟu Orupatu muṭaiyiṉa ṅku Oṉṟum kokkuvāy Oṉṟum paṭukaṇ
Oṉṟum kotta nā ṇuṭpaṭa niṟai mukkaḻañcaraiye Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyu mañcumāvum tirukkātukku cātta Iṭṭa nāṟaikaṇṭṭi Iraṇṭi(ṉ)ṉāl pon Araikkaḻañcey nālu mañcāṭiyu(m) mañcumāvum Ākap pon nākkaThe rest of the inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 5.512 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
